provisions.content:
CROSS-BORDER DIVISIONS OF LIMITED LIABILITY
COMPANIES

[ L.S.386.26

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 386.26
REGOLAMENTI DWAR CROSS-BORDER DIVISIONS
OF LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANIES
31 ta’ Jannar, 2023

L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 26 tal-2022, kif emendat bl-Avviż Legali 68 tal2024.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
